title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 247.670 - Sale of water outside district prohibited
text:
247.670.  Sale of water outside district prohibited. — No metropolitan water supply district created under sections 247.230 to 247.670 shall sell water directly or indirectly to any area nor municipality or political subdivision not included in the legally constituted boundaries of said metropolitan water supply district.
(L. 1949 p. 350 § 44)
